title: MapReduce Output Format
description: The MapReduce Output Format is responsible for writing the output of a MapReduce job to a specified location. It collaborates with the RecordWriter class to write the output data in a specific format. The MapReduce Output Format also plays a role in the overall architecture of the system, as it is responsible for managing the flow of data between different components of the system.
